ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "user_order_id" INTEGER /* User-defined identifier for the order */,
  "market_index" INTEGER /* Index of the market where the order is placed */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order is placed */,
  "base_asset_amount" REAL /* Amount of base asset to be traded */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trade (long or short) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (open, filled, canceled) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (limit, market) */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of the market (perp, spot) */,
  "slot" INTEGER /* Slot number where the order is placed */,
  "base_asset_amount_filled" REAL /* Amount of base asset filled so far */,
  "quote_asset_amount_filled" REAL /* Amount of quote asset filled so far */,
  "reduce_only" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the order reduces the user's position */,
  "trigger_price" REAL /* Trigger price for conditional orders */,
  "trigger_condition" TEXT /* Condition for triggering the order (above, below) */,
  "existing_position_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the existing position */,
  "post_only" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the order is a post-only order */,
  "immediate_or_cancel" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the order is an immediate-or-cancel order */,
  "oracle_price_offset" INTEGER /* Offset for the oracle price */,
  "auction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the auction period */,
  "auction_start_price" REAL /* Starting price for the auction */,
  "auction_end_price" REAL /* Ending price for the auction */,
  "max_ts" INTEGER /* Maximum timestamp for the order */,
  "oracle_price" REAL /* Oracle price at the time of order placement */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used for the order */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin used for the order */,
  "stop_loss_price" REAL /* Price at which the position will be automatically closed to prevent further losses */,
  "take_profit_price" REAL /* Price at which the position will be automatically closed to lock in profits */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., API, mobile app, web) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the order */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API key used to place the order (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_type FOREIGN KEY ("order_type") REFERENCES order_types ("order_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_market_index FOREIGN KEY ("market_index") REFERENCES markets ("market_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_market_type FOREIGN KEY ("market_type") REFERENCES market_types ("market_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for verification and communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user for compliance and legal purposes */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Unique referral code for the user */,
  "referred_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who referred this user */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  "two_factor_auth_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_index" INTEGER /* Unique index for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "base_asset" TEXT /* Base asset of the market */,
  "quote_asset" TEXT /* Quote asset of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of the market (perp, spot) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the market (active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market was last updated */,
  "leverage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum leverage allowed for the market */,
  "fee_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fee schedule for the market */,
  "min_order_size" REAL /* Minimum order size for the market */,
  "max_order_size" REAL /* Maximum order size for the market */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Smallest increment of price movement */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Smallest increment of quantity for orders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_types" (
  "order_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order type */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (limit, market) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order type was last updated */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the order type is visible to users */,
  "min_order_size" REAL /* Minimum order size for the order type */,
  "max_order_size" REAL /* Maximum order size for the order type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_types" (
  "market_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market type */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of the market (perp, spot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market type was last updated */,
  "is_margin_trading_allowed" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if margin trading is allowed for the market type */,
  "default_leverage" INTEGER /* Default leverage for the market type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that executed the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "market_index" INTEGER /* Index of the market where the trade occurred */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "base_asset_amount" REAL /* Amount of base asset traded */,
  "quote_asset_amount" REAL /* Amount of quote asset traded */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trade (long or short) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (filled, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, mobile app, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_market_index FOREIGN KEY ("market_index") REFERENCES markets ("market_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user holding the position */,
  "market_index" INTEGER /* Index of the market where the position is held */,
  "base_asset_amount" REAL /* Amount of base asset in the position */,
  "quote_asset_amount" REAL /* Amount of quote asset in the position */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the position (long or short) */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the position */,
  "liquidation_price" REAL /* Liquidation price of the position */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the position (open, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position was last updated */,
  "unrealized_pnl" REAL /* Unrealized profit and loss for the position */,
  "realized_pnl" REAL /* Realized profit and loss for the position */,
  "margin_used" REAL /* Margin used for the position */,
  "is_isolated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the position is isolated or cross-margin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_positions_market_index FOREIGN KEY ("market_index") REFERENCES markets ("market_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user holding the balance */,
  "asset" TEXT /* Asset for which the balance is held */,
  "balance" REAL /* Total balance of the asset */,
  "available_balance" REAL /* Available balance of the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the balance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the balance was last updated */,
  "locked_balance" REAL /* Balance that is currently locked in open positions or orders */,
  "last_updated_oracle_price" REAL /* Last recorded oracle price for the balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oracle_prices" (
  "oracle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oracle price */,
  "market_index" INTEGER /* Index of the market for which the price is provided */,
  "oracle_price" REAL /* Oracle price for the market */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the oracle price (e.g., Chainlink, Band Protocol) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oracle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oracle_prices_market_index FOREIGN KEY ("market_index") REFERENCES markets ("market_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_changes" (
  "status_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order whose status changed */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., filled, canceled, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_changes_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., order status, market update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "notification_source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
